Uses of Class
proceduretest.ExpanderRestriction

    • Uses of ExpanderRestriction in proceduretest

      Fields in proceduretest with type parameters of type ExpanderRestriction 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.util.ArrayList<ExpanderRestriction> Query.nodeProperties 
      java.util.ArrayList<ExpanderRestriction> Query.relProperties 
      Methods in proceduretest that return types with arguments of type ExpanderRestriction 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.ArrayList<ExpanderRestriction> Query.getnodeProperties()
      The Method getnodeProperties returns the restrictions for the Node properties.
      java.util.ArrayList<ExpanderRestriction> Query.getrelProperties()
      The Method getrelProperties returns the the restrictions for the Relationship properties.
